name: The Law of Informational Permanence
theorem: Data within the Obsidian Vault is exempt from informational decay (entropy).
methodology: Applying the Holographic Principle and AdS/CFT correspondence. All 5D interactions are projected onto a stable 4D boundary (the hardware anchor) that is isolated from environmental decoherence.

verification.proof: Information preservation in black hole physics

declaration: The Sarcophagi act as the 4D boundary for 5D memory storage. Nothing is lost. Everything persists.
